news.headline: Russia and US teams may meet on Ukraine in Riyadh in mid-April - TASS.
Bitcoin struggles near $90K resistance due to sell pressure from short-term holders. Liquidity decline and lack of new demand also hinder rally.
news.summary: Bitcoin's price has seen a decline after hitting $88,752 on March 24, with struggles to break the $88,000 resistance, reducing chances for a $90,000 retest by the end of Q1. One key reason is the constant sell-side pressure from short-term holders (STHs), with 3.4 million BTC held in loss, the largest since July 2018. This selling pressure is reflected in the accumulation trend score falling below 0.1. Liquidity conditions have also contracted, with daily transfer volumes down 47% to $5.2 billion, active addresses dropping 18%, and BTC futures market open interest decreasing by 24%. The lack of new demand, combined with macroeconomic uncertainty, has slowed market recovery. Long-Term Holders still retain 40% of the network wealth, with potential for a demand surge once a strong uptrend is established.

news.headline: Pacifica Taco Bell gets renov. New interior, bar, patio seating. Operated by DRG, 350+ locations.
news.summary: Located in Pacifica, California, the Taco Bell Cantina has revamped its interior to enhance the customer experience. Renowned for its stunning ocean views, this Taco Bell is recognized as the world's most scenic location. The recent renovation includes the addition of an indoor-outdoor bar and an expanded patio area for seating. Managed by Diversified Restaurant Group (DRG), a major Taco Bell franchisee operating more than 350 locations, visitors can also enjoy a fresh drink menu at this picturesque establishment.

news.headline: NYU Langone Heart cardiologists present at ACC's 75th Annual Scientific Session in Chicago, showcasing latest findings.
news.summary: Cardiologists from NYU Langone Heart will be presenting their recent clinical findings and research discoveries at the 2025 Annual Scientific Session of the American College of Cardiology (ACC) in Chicago from March 29 to 31. The event will feature discussions on various important topics related to cardiology, attracting a wide audience. This gathering serves as a platform for experts to share insights and advancements in the field, with attendance numbers expected to exceed thousands. The research presented at the conference is anticipated to have a significant impact on the future of cardiovascular medicine.

news.headline: UNITE HERE Local 25 calls for Henrico residents to decide on controversial Roseshire Gaming Parlor after Governor Youngkin's veto, citing the right for communities to have a say.
news.summary: A press release from UNITE HERE Local 25 in Richmond, Virginia, expressed disappointment over Governor Youngkin's veto of a clause in the state budget. This clause would have allowed Henrico residents to decide on the Churchill Downs Roseshire Gaming Parlor. The veto means residents lose the opportunity to choose on having HHR slot machines. The local community believes they should have a say in the expansion of gaming in their area. The decision impacts the future of gaming in Henrico and the involvement of its residents in determining this issue.

news.headline: TEN beats Q4 earnings estimate with 42 cents EPS, $188.26M sales; shares rise; fleet utilization at 93.3%.
news.summary: Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd (NYSE:TEN) exceeded analyst expectations with reported earnings per share of 42 cents, surpassing the consensus estimate of 37 cents. The company also achieved quarterly sales of $188.26 million, beating the projected $166.22 million. Following these results, the company's shares are trading higher. During the 2024 fourth quarter, four vessels underwent scheduled dry dockings, leading to a fleet utilization rate of 93.3%. This resulted in an average TCE per ship per day of $30,107 and adjusted EBITDA of $85.6 million.

news.summary: Lockheed Martin and Google Public Sector have revealed plans to merge their technologies in order to enhance decision-making and innovation within Lockheed Martin's AI Factory Ecosystem. The collaboration, announced on March 27, 2025, is expected to bring synergies between the two companies, with Google bringing its expertise in AI to further advance the capabilities of Lockheed Martin. This initiative signifies a strategic move that aims to drive progress and efficiency within the sector.

Morpheus introduces decentralized AI Forge, with "Forge" tool repository for developers to create smart agents without code.
news.summary: Morpheus, a platform dedicated to decentralized AI infrastructure, has recently introduced "Forge," an innovative tool repository tailored for assisting developers and corporations in constructing and overseeing AI-powered smart agents without the need for coding. Forge by Morpheus presents users with a collection of open-source and decentralized resources aimed at facilitating the deployment of agents for various purposes such as automation, personal aid, and governance responsibilities. This platform seamlessly integrates machine learning, automation, and natural language processing to streamline the process of creating agents. As per the company, all tools within the Forge are open-source and/or decentralized, providing the opportunity for anyone interested to develop a genuinely open-source and decentralized agent.

news.headline: Senator Cruz proposes bill to block Fed from launching CBDC, joining Emmer. Fed has 4 CBDC research projects. Some criticize CBDC for privacy concerns.
news.summary: US Senator Ted Cruz introduced a bill on March 26 to ban the Federal Reserve from issuing a central bank digital currency (CBDC). The “Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act” aims to prevent the Fed from offering certain products or services to individuals. This bill is similar to Minnesota Representative Tom Emmer's anti-CBDC legislation reintroduced on March 6. Since 2020, the Fed has been exploring a digital US dollar, with at least four ongoing research projects. Cruz has been opposing CBDCs since 2022. Critics argue CBDCs may infringe on privacy rights and lead to government overreach. Though some nations like Israel and Iran are exploring CBDCs, in the US, President Trump and Fed Chair Jerome Powell are against them. The technology could update financial systems but also centralize the money supply.

news.headline: BioOx Grow is certified for organic production by OMRI, enhancing plant growth naturally for agriculture.
news.summary: Located in East Hanover, New Jersey, BioOx has recently obtained certification from the Organic Materials Review Institute (OMRI) for their agricultural growth supplement, BioOx Natural Media for Plants, also known as BioOx Grow. This product complies with USDA National Organic Program regulations, making it suitable for organic production. BioOx Grow is a groundbreaking solution for both large and small-scale agriculture, as well as landscaping, as it naturally enhances plant growth. To learn more about BioOx Grow, visit their website at www.bioox.us/grow/.

news.headline: Robinhood expands into private banking, introducing new offerings for 3.2M Gold subscribers, aiming to capture a slice of the $114T wealth transfer to tech-savvy investors - Bernstein.
news.summary: Robinhood, listed on NASDAQ as HOOD, has made a strategic move by venturing into private banking to attract a portion of the estimated $114 trillion wealth transfer that is expected to flow towards younger, tech-savvy investors. Analysts at Bernstein noted in an investor note that this shift towards higher-end financial services, traditionally targeted at the affluent, seems to be successful for Robinhood. The company has introduced three new major products: Robinhood Strategies, an automated investment advisory service; Robinhood Cortex, an AI-powered research assistant; and Robinhood Private Banking, a suite offering savings, checking, and concierge perks. These offerings are currently accessible or being progressively rolled out to Robinhood's 3.2 million Gold subscribers. According to the analysts, these product launches demonstrate Robinhood's ambition to transition from a primarily trading-focused app to a comprehensive financial platform. The company's Gold membership base has nearly doubled in 2024, signifying an increasing trend towards this evolution.

news.headline: OAC marks 20th Anniversary with "Imagine a World Without Weight Stigma" Creative Contest.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on March 27, 2025, the Obesity Action Coalition (OAC) announced a new initiative to mark its 20th Anniversary. It seeks to inspire a broader conversation on addressing social attitudes toward obesity.

news.headline: Dr. Chavez highlights the connection between sex, intimacy, and improved sleep quality during Sleep Awareness Month.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, during Sleep Awareness Month, Dr. Chavez highlighted the positive impact of sex and intimacy on sleep quality. Discussions focused on the benefits of these factors, including improved sleep patterns and overall well-being. Sleep experts emphasized the correlation between sexual activity and deep, restorative sleep. This awareness campaign aimed to educate individuals on the importance of incorporating intimacy into their daily routines for better sleep. Sleep quality can significantly improve with a consistent practice of intimacy, leading to healthier sleep patterns, according to professionals in the field.

USDT0 now live on OP Superchain, enhancing cross-chain stablecoin adoption. Superchain dominates 52% of Ethereum layer-2 transactions, with $4.2 billion total value locked. Stablecoins reach $228B, Ethereum leads in market cap. USDT preferred. Tether's US Treasury holdings propelling profits. Stablecoin regulations may be issued in two months.
news.summary: The article discusses the deployment of the cross-chain US-dollar stablecoin USDT0 to Optimism’s Superchain, increasing its accessibility across Ethereum's layer-2 ecosystem. The stablecoin is a bridged version of Tether’s USDT, launched in January within the Tether ecosystem and now live on the OP mainnet. Superchain, accounting for 52% of Ethereum layer-2 transactions, has shown growth in its dominance from 36.6% to 51.9% since September. The Superchain's Chief Growth Officer projected it to reach 80% share of Ethereum L2 transactions this year. Currently securing over $4.2 billion in total value, the platform aims to attract more top-tier assets and partners with the deployment of USDT0. The total value of stablecoins in circulation has reached nearly $228 billion, with Ethereum accounting for 58% of the total supply. Tether’s USDT remains the most widely used stable asset. Tether’s US Treasury holdings have contributed to its profitability, with the stablecoin market gaining significance in the US, as stablecoin regulations may be forthcoming.

news.headline: Bitcoin’s rally paused as gold hits $3.1K record high. Uncertainty due to trade tariffs affecting market, with XAU/USD soaring. BTC short-term target at $91K.
news.summary: Bitcoin faced mixed forces on March 27 due to US trade tariffs and macroeconomic data. The second revision of US Q4 GDP came above forecast at 2.3%, while jobless claims missed estimates. Trump's tariffs on non-US cars added to concerns, causing uncertainty in the market. Gold hit all-time highs of $3,059 per ounce, gaining $7 trillion in market cap in 12 months. BTC price had a short-term target of $91,000, with bullish perspectives from traders eyeing $112,000. The market speculated on a potential breakout for Bitcoin, but advised readers to conduct their own research before investment decisions.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.3%, marking an increase of 2.1% from the previous quarter.
